notes: Full menu captured for The Ram University Village (Seattle) including taplist, cocktails, food, happy hour, craveyard, kids, and desserts. Cans & Bottles listed without prices (seasonal variety); bottle wine list not present. Note: menu text appears to be the Boise menu page but context header indicates University Village, Seattle — captured as presented. Daily specials included for context but not as standard dishes.

dishes.name: Crispy Brussel Sprouts
dishes.description: Truffle oil, parmesan, chopped bacon.

dishes.name: Fried Cheese
dishes.description: The Ultimate Cheese Pull! Mozzarella and Romano cheese, oregano-garlic Italian breading. Served with house-made marinara and ranch dressing for dipping.

dishes.name: Onion Rings
dishes.description: Served with rosette sauce.

dishes.name: Pacific Crab, Shrimp & Artichoke Dip
dishes.description: Pacific crab, Oregon bay shrimp, mixed with artichoke hearts, mayo, parmesan and red onion, oven roasted. Served with garlic buttered crostini.

dishes.name: Fried Pickle Chips
dishes.description: Lightly breaded, served with rosette sauce.

dishes.name: Armadillo Eggs
dishes.description: A RAM Original! Chicken married with diced jalapeños, pepper jack cheese, cream cheese, secret sauce and seasonings, rolled in saltine crackers, cooked golden, served with ranch dressing.

dishes.name: Boneless Wings
dishes.description: Served with Blue Cheese or Ranch dressing. Choice of Sauce: Naked, Buffalo, Hot Honey Sriracha, or BBQ.

dishes.name: Bone-In Wings
dishes.description: Served with Blue Cheese or Ranch dressing. Choice of Sauce: Naked, Buffalo, Hot Honey Sriracha, or BBQ.

dishes.name: Pretzel & Beer Cheese Fondue
dishes.description: Warm authentic Bavarian pretzel sticks, Buttface Amber Ale beer cheese fondue.

dishes.name: Nachos
dishes.description: Cheddar jack, black beans, sour cream, roasted jalapeños, cilantro, salsa, pico de gallo, guacamole, and cheddar cheese sauce. Add blackened chicken, beef chorizo, or pork carnitas for $3 each.

dishes.name: Roasted Veggie Pizza
dishes.description: Beer-crust pizza. Garlic-artichoke white sauce base with mozzarella, roasted mushrooms, bell peppers, garlic confit, artichoke hearts, and arugula. 12" crust made with Big Horn Hefeweizen.

dishes.name: Chicken Bacon Ranch Pizza
dishes.description: Beer-crust pizza. Mozzarella, grilled chicken, chopped bacon, tomato, ranch dressing, garlic, parsley, finished with buffalo sauce.

dishes.name: 1971 Classic Pizza
dishes.description: Beer-crust pizza. Pepperoni, Italian sausage, Canadian bacon, sautéed garlic mushrooms, black olives, roasted bell peppers.

dishes.name: Rambo Pizza
dishes.description: Beer-crust pizza. Canadian bacon, pepperoni, Italian sausage.

dishes.name: Create Your Own Pizza
dishes.description: House-made red sauce & mozzarella cheese. 12" beer crust. Protein add-ons $3.25, veggie add-ons $2.

dishes.name: French Onion Wagyu Burger
dishes.description: Premium Wagyu beef patty, Swiss cheese, caramelized onions, French onion aioli, roasted garlic oil-drizzled arugula, finished with crispy onions.

dishes.name: The Ricardo Burger
dishes.description: Swiss cheese, Canadian bacon, shredded pork, dill pickles, and dijon mayo. Served on a toasted pub roll.

dishes.name: Ozark's BBQ Smashburger
dishes.description: Smoked cheddar, Porter BBQ sauce, applewood-smoked bacon, lettuce, onion, tomato, and roasted garlic mayo.

dishes.name: Hillbilly Burger
dishes.description: Crumbled blue cheese, applewood-smoked bacon, lettuce, blue cheese mayo, and onion crisps.

dishes.name: Brewmaster Burger
dishes.description: Amber Ale beer cheese sauce, applewood-smoked bacon, and an onion ring crown.

dishes.name: Husky Burger
dishes.description: 1 lb. seasoned patty, triple American cheese, smoked bacon, lettuce, tomato, onion, ketchup, mustard, mayo, and dill pickles. Served on a giant bun.

dishes.name: Jam Session Burger
dishes.description: A Guest & Staff Favorite! American cheese, crisp lettuce, Murph's house-made glazed onion bacon jam, signature Ram pub sauce, and dill pickles.

dishes.name: Oklahoma Smash Burger
dishes.description: 2025 Burger-Rama favorite! Seasoned beef patty smashed with onions and grilled, steakhouse aioli, arugula tossed in red wine vinaigrette, house-made cheddar cheese sauce, and applewood-smoked bacon.

dishes.name: Ram Bam Smashburger
dishes.description: Double American cheese, lettuce, signature RAM pub sauce, and pickle relish.

dishes.name: Stadium Bacon & Mushroom Burger
dishes.description: Sautéed garlic mushrooms, cheddar, garlic mayo, applewood-smoked bacon, lettuce, tomato.

dishes.name: Ram Classic Cheeseburger
dishes.description: Lettuce, tomato, onion, mayo, and cheddar cheese.

dishes.name: The Broadway Patty Melt
dishes.description: Grilled beef patty layered with garlic-roasted mushrooms, smoked bacon, sweet onion compote, Murph's bacon jam, Havarti cheese, and steakhouse garlic aioli on grilled marbled rye.

dishes.name: Huli Huli Chicken Sandwich
dishes.description: Teriyaki-ginger marinated grilled chicken with Canadian bacon, grilled pineapple, pepper jack cheese, mayo, crisp lettuce, and tomato on a toasted bun.

dishes.name: Amber Ale Steak Sandwich
dishes.description: Amber Ale-marinated sirloin grilled and thinly sliced, with steakhouse aioli, Havarti cheese, crispy onions, aged parmesan, and arugula tossed in red wine vinaigrette on a toasted garlic French roll. Served with Au Jus.

dishes.name: Pacific Crab, Shrimp & Artichoke Melt
dishes.description: Pacific crab, Oregon bay shrimp, artichokes, parmesan, red onion, mayo, diced tomato, and melted cheddar jack cheese. Served on a toasted French baguette.

dishes.name: Rule the Roost Chicken Sandwich
dishes.description: Buttermilk-battered chicken, grilled bun, Dijon mayo, lettuce, dill pickles.

dishes.name: Turkey Havarti Melt
dishes.description: Sliced roasted turkey, Wisconsin Havarti, garlic mayo, tomato, and applewood-smoked bacon. Served on grilled sourdough.

dishes.name: French Dip
dishes.description: 1/2 lb. thin-sliced roast beef on a grilled hearth-baked French roll. Served with au jus.

dishes.name: Signature Reuben No. 507
dishes.description: After 507 refinements, the ultimate Reuben. Shaved corned beef, creamy Havarti, Murph's bacon'd sauerkraut, horseradish cream & remoulade sauce, and thousand island on grilled marbled rye.

dishes.name: Rambalaya
dishes.description: Sautéed shrimp, chicken, and andouille sausage simmered in a rich, savory Creole broth with jasmine rice and green onion.

dishes.name: Big Red's IPA Baby Back Ribs
dishes.description: Slow-braised in Big Red's IPA and spices, finished on the grill with Porter BBQ sauce. Served with chipotle slaw & fries. Half Rack $23.99 / Full Rack $29.99.

dishes.name: Tuscan Chicken Mushroom Pasta
dishes.description: Linguine pasta topped with seared chicken, Tuscan mushroom cream sauce, and sundried tomatoes. Finished with parmesan and chopped basil. Served with toasted garlic bread.

dishes.name: Shrimp or Chicken Scampi Linguine
dishes.description: Linguine pasta, diced tomato, mushrooms, garlic wine butter sauce, sautéed roasted garlic shrimp or chicken. Served with toasted garlic bread.

dishes.name: Center-Cut Top Sirloin Steak
dishes.description: Finished with maitre d' butter, served with parmesan mashed potatoes and seasonal vegetable. 6oz or 8oz available.

dishes.name: Big Horn Fish & Chips
dishes.description: Wild Alaska cod hand-dipped in Ram Big Horn Hefeweizen beer batter, finished with seasoned panko-breading. Served with golden fries, house-made dill tartar & yum yum sauce. 2-piece or 3-piece.

dishes.name: Blackened Fish Tacos
dishes.description: Blackened seasoned seared cod, pickled red onion, cilantro crema, chipotle-lime slaw with salsa, cilantro-lime rice, borracho black beans. Choice of corn or flour tortilla.

dishes.name: Mac & Cheese
dishes.description: Cavatappi corkscrew pasta, rich creamy cheddar cheese sauce, gratiné. Multiple add-ons available.

dishes.name: Chicken Tenders
dishes.description: Served with fries. Sauce choices: Ranch, Honey Mustard, Buffalo, Hot Honey Sriracha, BBQ. (3) $14.99 / (5) $17.99.

dishes.name: Southwest Kale Caesar
dishes.description: Chopped kale, red bell peppers, roasted corn salsa, cherry tomatoes, feta cheese, diced avocado, and Southwest Caesar dressing. Finished with green onion and toasted croutons.

dishes.name: Blackened Salmon Bowl
dishes.description: Cilantro-lime rice, black beans, chopped red and green cabbage, matchstick carrots, red onion, shredded cheddar-jack cheese, fresh cilantro, pickled red onion, sour cream, guacamole, blackened boneless salmon fillet.

dishes.name: Italian Chop Chop Chicken Salad
dishes.description: Iceberg, arugula, garbanzo beans, salami, diced tomato, tossed in red wine vinaigrette, mozzarella, diced grilled chicken, parmesan cheese, fresh basil.

dishes.name: Grilled Shrimp Avocado Bowl
dishes.description: Fresh corn salsa, avocado, jasmine rice, blackened grilled shrimp, and signature yum yum sauce. Also available with blackened chicken.

dishes.name: Ahi Poke Bowl
dishes.description: Jasmine sushi rice, shoyu-marinated ahi tuna, sliced jalapeños, sriracha-mayo drizzle, sliced green onion, pickled cucumbers, sliced avocado, and sesame seeds.

dishes.name: Chicken Almond Salad
dishes.description: Teriyaki-ginger marinated chicken, grilled & chilled, served sliced over mixed greens, matchstick red bell peppers, crispy chow mein noodles, toasted slivered almonds, and celery. Finished with sesame seeds and ginger dressing.

dishes.name: Olympus Salad
dishes.description: Mixed greens, crumbled feta, artichoke hearts, roasted red bell pepper, bacon, avocado, pickled red onions, and garlic artichoke dressing.

dishes.name: Tossed Cobb
dishes.description: Avocado, chopped bacon, boiled egg, blue cheese, tomato, mixed greens, and blue cheese dressing.

dishes.name: Crispy Brussel Sprouts (Side)
dishes.description: Side portion of crispy brussels sprouts.

dishes.name: NW Clam Chowder
dishes.description: Cup or bowl.

dishes.name: Disorder Porter Chili
dishes.description: Cup or bowl.

dishes.name: Side House Green Salad
dishes.description: Side house green salad.

dishes.name: Side Caesar Salad
dishes.description: Side caesar salad.

dishes.name: Cilantro-Lime Rice
dishes.description: Side of cilantro-lime rice.

dishes.name: Jasmine Sushi Rice
dishes.description: Side of jasmine sushi rice.

dishes.name: Side Mac & Cheese
dishes.description: Side portion of mac & cheese.

dishes.name: Sweet Potato Fries
dishes.description: Side of sweet potato fries.

dishes.name: Regular Fries
dishes.description: Side of regular fries.

dishes.name: Tater Tots
dishes.description: Side of tater tots.

dishes.name: Onion Rings (Side)
dishes.description: Side of onion rings.

dishes.name: Seasonal Vegetable
dishes.description: Side of seasonal vegetable.

dishes.name: Parmesan Mashed Potatoes
dishes.description: Side of parmesan mashed potatoes.

dishes.name: Deep Fried Ice Cream
dishes.description: Vanilla ice cream coated in cinnamon-spiced corn flakes, topped with whipped cream and Hefeweizen caramel sauce. Served in a tortilla bowl.

dishes.name: New York Style Cheesecake
dishes.description: Graham cracker crust, topped with strawberry purée and whipped cream.

dishes.name: Seasonal Bread Pudding
dishes.description: Seasonal Bananas Foster: topped with buttery brown sugar bananas, sweet cream vanilla ice cream, warmed Hefeweizen caramel sauce, and cinnamon.

dishes.name: Mile High Mud Pie
dishes.description: Kona coffee ice cream & Cookies 'n Cream ice cream on an Oreo cookie crumb crust. Topped with whipped cream, caramel, and almonds. Served in a pool of hot fudge.

dishes.name: Chocolate Chip Skillet Cookie
dishes.description: Skillet cookie topped with vanilla ice cream.

dishes.name: Bristol Bay Alaska Wild Sockeye Salmon
dishes.description: Boneless fillet simply grilled or blackened with lemon, garlic, salt & pepper. Served with parmesan mashed potatoes and seasonal vegetable.

dishes.name: RAM Tacos
dishes.description: Pickled red onion, cilantro crema, chipotle-lime slaw, salsa, cilantro-lime rice, borracho black beans. Choice of flour or corn tortillas. Blackened Chicken or Pork Carnitas $16, Grilled Shrimp $18.
dishes.price_note: Blackened Chicken $16 | Pork Carnitas $16 | Grilled Shrimp $18

dishes.name: The Faburgé
dishes.description: Wisconsin Cheddar, Canadian bacon, onion crisps, mayo, applewood-smoked bacon, fried egg. Angus Beef $18.99 / Wagyu $21.99.

dishes.name: Chimichurri Burger
dishes.description: Smoked cheddar cheese, steakhouse aioli, arugula tossed in red wine vinaigrette, and savory house-made chimichurri. Angus Beef $17.29 / Wagyu $20.29.

dishes.name: Humble Bee Burger
dishes.description: Caramelized onions, Wisconsin Havarti cheese, candied bacon, Dijon mayo, lettuce. Angus Beef $18.49 / Wagyu $21.49.

beverages.name: Yellow Pine IPA
beverages.style: IPA — Collaboration with The Bruery & Mill 95. Bone-dry and bright, pine and grapefruit rind, citrus blossom and herbal snap. Clean, crisp, and decisively bitter.

beverages.name: She Devil
beverages.style: Dark Strong Ale — Deep brown with ruby highlights. Fierce hop bite (CTZ and Cascade), rich malt backbone. 7.5% ABV / 80 IBU.

beverages.name: Clearwater Kolsch
beverages.style: Kölsch — Crisp and clean. Hallertauer Mittelfruh hops, Pilsner/Carafoam/Acidulated malt. 4.9% ABV / 22 IBU.

beverages.name: 71 Pale Ale
beverages.style: Pale Ale — Soft sweet malt body, grapefruit, pine, floral spiced candy. Cascade/Chinook hops. 5.8% ABV / 45 IBU.

beverages.name: Game Trail Session IPA
beverages.style: Session IPA — Bear Island Brewing Collaboration. Citrus, pine, tropical. Idaho 7, El Dorado, Citra hops. 5.1% ABV / 75.5 IBU.

beverages.name: Cincopatas Mexican-Style Lager
beverages.style: Mexican-Style Lager — Refreshing, light. 5.2% ABV / 18 IBU.

beverages.name: Big Dread Hazy IPA
beverages.style: Hazy IPA — Tropical citrus, dank fruit, resinous pine. Idaho 7, Mosaic, Simcoe, Citra, Cascade, flaked wheat & oats. 7.6% ABV / 50 IBU.

beverages.name: Buttface Amber Ale
beverages.style: Amber Ale — 2024 GABF Silver Medal. Smooth and malty, caramel & toffee, balanced hop finish. 5.8% ABV / 26 IBU.

beverages.name: Hometown Blonde
beverages.style: Blonde Ale — Crisp and refreshing, subtle honey, malt, citrus. 4.5% ABV / 20 IBU.

beverages.name: Big Horn Hefeweizen
beverages.style: Hefeweizen — German style, characteristically cloudy, banana and clove. 5.2% ABV / 15 IBU.

beverages.name: Total Disorder Porter
beverages.style: Porter — Rich and flavorful, chocolate, coffee, caramel, smooth finish. 5.2% ABV / 28 IBU.

beverages.name: Big Red's IPA
beverages.style: IPA — Assertively hoppy, bold citrus, grapefruit. 6.2% ABV / 60 IBU.

beverages.name: Irish Coffee
beverages.style: Hot cocktail — Jameson Irish Whiskey, Baileys Irish Cream, hot coffee, whipped cream.

beverages.name: Tiramisu Martini
beverages.style: Dessert martini — Mr. Black Cold Brew Coffee Liqueur, Baileys Irish Cream, Crème De Cacao, whipped cream.

beverages.name: Gin Dandy Lemonade Cooler
beverages.style: Refresher — Hendrick's Gin, simple syrup, lemonade, soda, muddled lemon.

beverages.name: Sailor Jerry Mai Tai
beverages.style: Tiki — Sailor Jerry Rum, Myers's Rum, Triple Sec, orange & pineapple juices, grenadine.

beverages.name: Spicy Pineapple Margarita
beverages.style: Margarita — Hornitos Reposado Tequila, Cointreau, fresh jalapeño, lime, pineapple juice. Sub Ilegal Joven Mezcal +$1.

beverages.name: Spiked Strawberry Lemonade
beverages.style: Lemonade cocktail — New Amsterdam Lemon Vodka, strawberry purée, lemonade.

beverages.name: Vanilla Old Fashioned
beverages.style: Old Fashioned — Maker's Mark, Tuaca Vanilla Citrus Liqueur, black walnut bitters.

beverages.name: Passion Fruit Mojito
beverages.style: Mojito — Don Q Pasión Rum, lime, fresh mint, strawberry, soda.

beverages.name: PNW Mule
beverages.style: Moscow Mule — New Amsterdam Vodka, lime, Fever-Tree Ginger Beer.

beverages.name: Long Island Iced Tea
beverages.style: Long Island — Original, Peach, or Hawaiian Pineapple.

beverages.name: Proud Mary
beverages.style: Bloody Mary — New Amsterdam Vodka, veggie and cheese kabob, pickled asparagus, chili-lime salted rim, snit of Blonde Ale.

beverages.name: RAM Margarita
beverages.style: Margarita — Exotico Blanco Tequila, lime, sweet & sour, salted rim. Sub Ilegal Joven Mezcal +$1.

beverages.name: Strawberry Coconut 'Rita
beverages.style: Margarita — 1800 Coconut Tequila, Cointreau, strawberry purée, sugar rim.

beverages.name: Lakewood Lemon Drop
beverages.style: Lemon Drop — Tito's Handmade Vodka, muddled lemon, lemonade, soda.

beverages.name: Athletic Brewing NA Beer
beverages.style: Non-alcoholic beer — Seasonal variety, 12 oz. cans.

beverages.name: High Noon Vodka Seltzer
beverages.style: Hard seltzer — Seasonal variety, 12 oz. cans.

beverages.name: 2 Towns Cider
beverages.style: Hard cider — Seasonal variety, 12 oz. cans.
